name: context-kernel
description: Reduce noisy tool output before it enters model context, and expose query-focused Python code slicing.

interface.shortDescription: Compress noisy tool output and slice Python context
interface.longDescription: Context Kernel reduces noisy tool output with conservative hooks and includes an on-demand Python code slicer for query-focused context reduction.
defaultPrompt: Use the kernel-slice script to inspect only the Python symbol relevant to this task
Compress noisy command output while preserving errors and warnings
